commands.repair_reason: Security-sensitive auth-boundary PR is open, conflicting, and missing contributor proof; maintainer/security review should decide the rebase, split, and lifecycle fixes.; Needs attention: The PR hardens a real auth boundary, but the proposed token registry lifecycle and unrelated plugin-loader fallback need security review before merge.; Review finding: [P1] Guard runtime clears by server identity — src/gateway/mcp-... (sha=e14c02d991111d782bf7c5a1ca1b02d12b9a055a)
commands.review_summary:
This PR binds loopback MCP scope to registered per-backend bearer tokens, removes generated scope headers/env values, adds scoped cache invalidation/tests, and changes bundled plugin public-surface loading fallback behavior.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows a valid loopback bearer can still vary x-session-key, x-openclaw-account-id, or x-openclaw-message-channel, and those values flow into resolveGatewayScopedTools through McpLoopbackToolCache; no live exploit was run in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Security-sensitive auth-boundary PR is open, conflicting, and missing contributor proof; maintainer/security review should decide the rebase, split, and lifecycle fixes.

target.title: fix(gateway): bind loopback MCP scope to per-backend bearer token (#64993)
